title: What would YOU do with with an Eva
display_title: What would YOU do with with an Eva
wikitext:
[]: What would YOU do with with an Eva             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:29 pm Well, just to start off things, I will use it for WORLD DOMINATION! HAHAHAHAHAHAH!. Ahem. Yes. I will use it. Fuuuuufufufufufufu

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:30 pm look out middle east.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:35 pm Why do they have to look out? (Except for some terrorists).

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:39 pm They know why.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:40 pm I'd set it free.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:44 pm BobBQ wrote: I'd set it free.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:44 pm Anyways. I will also use it for a few other purposes. They are all very devious indeed. Hehehe

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:44 pm From: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=133233#133233 The Imperialist wrote: Am I acting like a retard? I was being pretty serious.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:45 pm I would deny it, unless a group like SEELE didn't exist. In which case, I would still deny it because the police forces would be all over my ass. Unless they didn't mind that I owned one. In which case, I would still further deny owning one, because such organizations may either try to limit my piloting time or try to get it out of my hands altogether. Not worth the hassle.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:45 pm I am being serious. Again.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:45 pm ...I wouldn't take it having all those angels a2ttack you would be a huge pain in the ass.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:54 pm i would use it to go to into town and park it somewhere, and get a parking ticket, but then stomp on the police car, and then run off, and unknowingly destroy stuff but im in a big and clumsy Eva

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:55 pm That's...wonderful.

[]:             Quote Post by Squiggy » Tue Nov 06, 2007 5:59 pm Turn everyone in the world into fruit juice

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 6:03 pm Do you mean literally, or as a similie?

[]:             Quote Post by Squiggy » Tue Nov 06, 2007 6:07 pm Whichever one comes first

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 6:11 pm So you will turn humans into a mush of flesh, blood, intestines, grey matter, and other anatomical things. I like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 06, 2007 6:14 pm dont forget the brains!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Nov 06, 2007 6:17 pm that is what grey matter is. (well, not exactly, but you know what I mean)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 06, 2007 7:06 pm Ya, but it sounds so much better when u say "BRAAAAAAINNNNNSSSSS!!!!!!"
